description: Machine Learning and Deep Learning based projects developed using Python and python related frameworks

This repository presents a comparative computer vision and machine learning framework for the automated diagnosis of Bacterial Blight / Black Rot in mustard plants, a high-impact agricultural disease caused by Xanthomonas campestris pv. campestris (Xcc).
Machine learning framework for Enterococcus cecorum pathogenicity prediction (Antimicrobial Resistance + genomic islands + pangenome)

9class wafer defect classification + perclass anomaly detection. EfficientNetV2 with coordinate channels, twophase training, ONNX + ONNX Runtime verification (max diff < 1e4), PCA + Isolation Forest, SQLite storage.
A flexible and performant framework for training machine learning potentials.
A machine learning framework for predicting customer attrition in telecommunication.

AI-Model-Hub is a comprehensive repository that aggregates a wide range of AI models, machine learning frameworks, and practical resources. The goal is to provide a centralized platform where developers and researchers can  discover, experiment with, and integrate cutting-edge AI solutions into real-world applications while staying organized
Machine learning framework for predicting corrosion resistance and yield strength in Fe-Cr-Ni-Al-Cu high-entropy alloys
Build and deploy machine learning models with Pontos, an efficient framework that simplifies workflows using Python, PyTorch, and Docker.

This project investigates short-term arrival delay time prediction in freight rail operations using historical operational datasets and machine learning models. The framework captures delay propagation patterns to enhance prediction accuracy, improve operational efficiency, and assist decision-making in freight rail network management.

The pipeline designed for this analysis is a Hybrid Econometric-Machine Learning Framework. It is structured to bridge the gap between classical time-series econometrics (which focuses on theory and long-run relationships) and modern predictive modeling (which focuses on accuracy and handling complex patterns).

Causal machine learning framework for estimating individual treatment effects (ITE) of chemoradiotherapy in head and neck cancer. Implements CausalForestDML and DRLearner with doubly robust validation, SHAP-based feature importance, and decision curve analysis using the RADCURE dataset.
caretSDM applies a geoprocessing framework to the caret machine learning package, facilitating the access of Species Distribution Modeling community to state-of-the-art methods.
An inference server for your machine learning models, including support for multiple frameworks, multi-model serving and more
Machine Learning Framework for Formula 1 Race Strategy Optimization
A Julia machine learning framework

Central bank-grade factor-augmented inflation nowcasting and forecasting framework for Zimbabwe. Combines PCA-based macroeconomic factor extraction, machine learning models (Elastic Net, Random Forest, SVR, XGBoost), scenario analysis, and inflation regime classification aligned to SADC targets.

A comprehensive machine learning framework designed to quantify T20 cricket dynamics. This project leverages a multi-model ensemble approach to forecast the 2026 season, achieving a 0.71 AUC score by integrating squad strength, venue advantage, and real-time team form.

This project delivers a complete, end-to-end churn intelligence system from raw CSV files to an interactive Power BI dashboard and a machine learning prediction model, using a SQL first, analytics engineering approach.

This project is about analyzing the Abalone dataset using the CRISP-DM framework. The main goal is to use machine learning to predict the physical features of abalones (classification for sex and regression for age). This can help replace the old, slow, and invasive method of cutting the shell and counting the rings under a microscope.
A comprehensive machine learning framework for quantitative trading strategies

A fast, distributed, high performance gradient boosting (GBT, GBDT, GBRT, GBM or MART) framework based on decision tree algorithms, used for ranking, classification and many other machine learning tasks.
A differentiable PDE solving framework for machine learning
Fuzzy machine learning framework
A Machine Learning framework to predict cellular responses to drug compounds by analyzing high-dimensional gene expression profiles.

A curated portfolio of AI, Machine Learning, and Automation projects showcasing expertise in deep learning, NLP, web scraping, and data visualization. Includes work on recommendation systems, face embeddings, financial forecasting, and applied AI solutions built with Python, FastAPI, Django, and modern ML frameworks.
ytopt: machine-learning-based autotuning and hyperparameter optimization framework using Bayesian Optimization

Repository for the aticle: "Machine learning couples precipitation strengthening and transformation-induced plasticity". Contains the framework for physics-informed alloy design and property prediction.
Machine learning framework for detecting, classifying, and correcting harmonic distortions in power system signals using signal processing and deep learning techniques.
A Machine Learning Framework For Cryptocurrency Price Prediction Using Learning Models With Integrated Backtesting Capabilities.

OpenEnv environment for protoplanetary disk image analysis using machine learning.  Multi-task learning framework with 3 difficulty levels (transit detection, disk  classification, property estimation). Built for Meta Scaler OpenEnv Hackathon.
A universal machine learning force field framework

Capstone project for the Imperial College London AI & Machine Learning Certificate, showcasing end-to-end ML development  from data preparation to model training, evaluation, and insights using Python and modern ML frameworks.

brpc is an Industrial-grade RPC framework using C++ Language, which is often used in high performance system such as Search, Storage, Machine learning, Advertisement, Recommendation etc. "brpc" means "better RPC".
A Titlename:Hybrid Machine Learning and Deep Learning Framework for Real-Time Intrusion Detection with Explainable AI
Agent-Based Ant Colony Simulation with Machine Learning Behavior Classification - Complete simulation framework with DeepLearning4J CNN implementation
Leakage-free Machine Learning Framework for Diabetes Risk Prediction
This repository contains the implementation of MFCC-GNB XtractNet, a novel hybrid machine learning framework for detecting deepfake and synthetic voice recordings
Quantum Machine Learning Framework on Python for diverse machine learning tasks.
A machine learning framework designed to predict the biodegradability of textile materials based on fiber composition.
Monitoring framework for a machine learning anomaly detection system including drift detection, metric tracking, and production monitoring.

This project is a web-based disease prediction system developed using Machine Learning algorithms and deployed using a Flask framework.  The application allows users to select symptoms and predicts the most probable disease based on trained ML models.
A comparative machine learning framework for predicting physicochemical properties using 28 novel Weighted Sombor Indices.

The XFL Framework is a software platform that enables the configuration of experimentation parameters, the selection of measurement metrics, the deployment, and the visualization of results of a distributed machine learning algorithm (XFL) on real hardware nodes.
A Leakage-Aware, Clinically Constrained Machine Learning Framework for Multi-Class Cardiovascular Phenotyping from EHR Data
AI-powered cyber forensics tool that automatically analyzes system logs, detects anomalies using Machine Learning, reconstructs attack timelines, and generates forensic reports.

Research2Repo is an advanced, agentic framework designed to bridge the gap between academic machine learning research and functional codebase implementations. Specifically optimized for the Google Gemini ecosystem, it translates complex AI papers directly into modular, decoupled GitHub repositories.
A Multi-Operator Equivariant Framework for High-Performance Machine Learning Force Fields, supporting External Fields embedding and Physical Tensors prediction.
AutoFAIR is a model-agnostic framework for automated bias detection and adaptive fairness mitigation in machine learning systems.

Machine learning , python, css, html and js were used in this project. Flask framework also used. This project is develop to analyse the youtube data and predict the views and categories of our videos and compare our channels  videos with another channels.

A cross-platform (Python/Java) agentic AI framework designed to automate clinical diagnostics. The system employs specialized autonomous agents to ingest patient data, execute machine learning inferences, and provide actionable medical decision support. Optimized for early detection of chronic and infectious diseases.
Physics-informed machine learning framework for predicting and reducing harmonic distortion (THD) in residential power systems using AO-NFRS and Bayesian-optimized ANFIS.

A machine learning project that predicts diabetes-related complications such as cardiovascular disease, kidney disease, and neuropathy using patient clinical data. The project includes data cleaning, preprocessing, feature engineering, exploratory data analysis, and a multi-label classification framework.
Experimental framework for studying shortcut learning under spurious correlations in machine learning models.
A lightweight framework for implementing federated learning in decentralized environments. Designed for privacy-preserving machine learning and scalable model training.
Machine Learning framework written in pure Python 3.14
Machine learning-based classification framework for detecting spatially extended and diffuse emission in the high redshift universe, using multi-band broadband imaging.
Simple Framework to create game for my machine learning research testing AI
EMMA-STRAT A Multi-Omics Based Machine Learning Framework for Stratification of Endometrial Carcinoma Molecular Subtypes and MSI Status
A security framework integrating a Random Forest machine learning model and 2FA via a Flask REST API to enhance device authentication.
An integrated computational framework combining machine learning predictions with empirical multi-omics validation to systematically map and decode tracrRNA-dependent off-target (TDO) events.
This project builds a framework for forward prediction and reverse design of n-type TOPCon (Tunnel Oxide Passivated Contact) solar cells based on machine learning methods
A multimodal machine learning framework for tourism satisfaction prediction using BERT, ResNet, and DDA-optimized CatBoost with feature fusion and interpretability analysis.
A hands-on laboratory repository for practicing Machine Learning & Deep Learning concepts using Python, NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, Seaborn, and popular ML/DL frameworks.
A simulation framework evaluating the performance of rule-based, statistical, and ML (Machine Learning) trigger systems for real-time filtering of physics data streams.
Hybrid ensemble machine learning and deep learning framework for accurate and explainable software cost estimation.
A custom machine learning framework developed in Python, Rust and CUDA C++.

A security framework for Hinglish chatbots that detects and prevents prompt injection attacks using rule-based and machine learning methods. It preprocesses code-mixed text, identifies malicious inputs, and ensures safe, reliable, and real-time AI interactions in bilingual environments.

End-to-end Machine Learning and Deep Learning pipelines from data preprocessing to model evaluation. Includes tools for cleaning data, feature engineering, model training, and performance evaluation. Modular and scalable, supporting frameworks like TensorFlow, PyTorch, and Scikit-learn.
Open-source machine learning framework for Java. Designed with speed and lightweight in mind.
This is a machine learning framework built by C++ with C++ metaprogramming. It is built just for fun.

BorderGuard AI is a multi-modal security framework designed to protect critical border infrastructure. It combines Unsupervised Machine Learning for sensor anomaly detection with Computer Vision for real-time surveillance monitoring.
Hybrid interpretable framework integrating pharmacogenomic rules, rare variant functional inference, and machine learning for warfarin dose prediction

A full-stack learning journey combining Django REST Framework, React.js, and Machine Learning. Includes DRF practice APIs and a complete stock prediction portal using LSTM, data analysis, and real-world integration.

This repository contains the implementation of the research paper titled Comparative Performance of Machine Learning Regressors for Wind Power Forecasting: A Diagnostic Framework. The study utilizes wind turbine SCADA data to perform a diagnostic analysis using baseline regression models

An integrated research framework for quantifying drug-drug interactions using Fractional Differential Equations (FDE) and predicting clinical outcomes through machine learning. Features a production-ready analytical engine and exploratory data visualizations of FDA-documented interactions
Modular PennyLane-based quantum machine learning framework with reusable implementations of VQC and quantum kernel classifiers.
Structured notes on machine learning and deep learning concepts across multiple frameworks, focusing on both theoretical understanding and practical implementation.
An Explainable Machine Learning-Based Framework for Fault Prediction and Isolation in Telecommunication Networks
Implementing a diverse range of classical machine learning and optimization without frameworks.
Pre-exposure risk assessment for SARS-CoV-2 using Serum protein biomarkers. Machine learning framework (KNN+GA) with 7-protein panel.
A high-performance, low-latency machine learning model serving framework built in Rust.
A high-level architectural framework and best practices for scaling Machine Learning operations in a hyper-growth FinTech environment.
A curated list of awesome Machine Learning frameworks, libraries and software. With repository stars and forks
Autoware-ML is a machine learning framework for multiple tasks, supporting the full lifecycle - training, evaluation, optimization, and deployment of models with native runtime support in Autoware.

This thesis develops a multi-stage framework for detecting, ranking, and visualising money laundering activity on the Bitcoin blockchain using machine learning and network analysis of the Elliptic++ dataset.

This project is a Machine Learning-based web application that predicts the price of a car based on various features such as brand, year, fuel type, and more. The model is trained using a dataset of used cars and deployed using a Flask web framework to provide real-time predictions through a user-friendly interface.
is a neural network framework designed to discover efficient matrix multiplication algorithms using machine learning, specifically through tensor decomposition techniques.
A Predictive and Risk-Adaptive Framework using Machine Learning
Collection of machine learning projects spanning healthcare prediction, business analytics, and NLP - built with Python, scikit-learn, and deep learning frameworks.

This project builds a predictive analytics framework to forecast children in HHS care under the UAC Program. Using time-series and machine learning models, it converts historical data into forward-looking insights to support proactive planning and manage future care demand and system pressure.

This project delivers a unified, data-driven framework for credit card fraud detection and credit scoring, engineered to empower financial institutions with high-precision risk intelligence. The solution operationalizes advanced machine learning pipelinesspanning LightGBM, XGBoost, CatBoost, Random Forests, and Neural Networks

Pax is a Jax-based machine learning framework for training large scale models. Pax allows for advanced and fully configurable experimentation and parallelization, and has demonstrated industry leading model flop utilization rates.

An AI-based web application that predicts the risk of preeclampsia using machine learning models and antenatal clinical data. The system classifies patients into low, moderate, and high-risk categories and uses explainable AI to highlight key factors influencing the prediction, supporting early diagnosis and clinical decision-making.

Elastic Guardian is a modular AI framework that structures machine learning projects from research and prototyping to scalable deployment. It emphasizes clean architecture, reproducible pipelines, model evaluation, optimization, and API integration to transform experimental ML workflows into production-ready systems.
